mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_addresses WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM user_addresses WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_default = TRUE LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_addresses (user_id, recipient_name, phone, address, is_default, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{recipientName}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{isDefault}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_addresses SET recipient_name = #{recipientName}, phone = #{phone}, address = #{address}, is_default = #{isDefault}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user_addresses SET is_default = FALSE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user_addresses SET is_default = TRUE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
